en: Let's wind the clocks back a year.
These cops and lawyers wouldn't dare cross any of you.
ko: 이 경찰들과 변호사들은 너희를 건드릴 엄두도 못 내.

en: Did your balls drop off? Hmm?
You see, a guy like me... Freak.
A guy like me... Look, listen.
I know why you choose to have your little group therapy sessions in broad daylight.
ko: 너희가 낮에 그룹 치료 세션을 하는 이유를 알아.

en: I know why you're afraid to go out at night.
ko: 밤에 나가는 게 두려운 이유도 알아.

en: You see, Batman has shown Gotham your true colors, unfortunately.
ko: 배트맨이 고담에 너의 진짜 모습을 보여줬어, 안타깝게도.

en: And as for the television's so-called plan,
ko: 그리고 TV에서 말하는 계획에 대해 말하자면, 배트맨은 관할권이 없어.

en: Batman has no jurisdiction. He'll find him and make him squeal.
I know the squealers when I see them.
